name: Yolkmon
description: A Slime Digimon that still wears the shell from its Digitama . It has a carefree personality and lives its life by slipping into the nests of other Digimon. Because its Digitama shell acts as camouflage, it evolves while hardly being spotted. If by any chance it gets discovered by invading enemies, it will intimidate other Digimon with bubbles produced from its body.
